name: Centipede
description:
Centipede is a fixed shooter arcade game where the player controls a small, mobile defender at the bottom of the screen. The primary objective is to destroy a segmented centipede that descends from the top of the screen, snaking back and forth as it approaches the player. The centipede moves downwards one level each time it hits the edge of the screen. Shooting a segment of the centipede splits it into two smaller centipedes, each of which continues its movement independently. When a centipede segment is shot, it turns into a mushroom obstacle. The playfield is also populated with a random scattering of these mushrooms, and the centipede descends one level each time it hits a mushroom. The more mushrooms on the field, the faster the centipede descends. 

In addition to the centipede, other enemies spawn periodically: fleas that drop vertically from the top of the screen, creating mushrooms as they fall; spiders that scurry across the bottom of the screen in unpredictable patterns, sometimes moving towards the player, and occasionally eating the mushrooms, and scorpions that poison the mushrooms they touch which causes the centipede to descend rapidly when it touches those poisoned mushrooms. The game ends when the centipede reaches the bottom of the screen and makes contact with the player or when the player runs out of lives. Score is awarded for destroying centipede segments, other enemies, and mushrooms.

controls.arrow_up: Move the defender upwards within the player's zone.
controls.arrow_down: Move the defender downwards within the player's zone.
controls.arrow_left: Move the defender to the left within the player's zone.
controls.arrow_right: Move the defender to the right within the player's zone.
controls.space: Fire a laser shot from the defender.
